texto: We scarcely know how much of our pleasure and interest in life comes to us through our eyes until we have to do without them
autor: and part of that pleasure is that the eyes can choose where to look. But the ears can't choose where to listen.
explicacao: Orientação direta de and part of that pleasure is that the eyes can choose where to look. But the ears can't choose where to listen. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “We scarcely know how much of our pleasure and interest in life comes to us through our eyes until…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, ursula-k-le-guin, gifts, útil em momentos de gifts.
